description: One row per company / party / period reconciliation outcome. Written by erpnext_sbca.API.reconciliation. Acts as the idempotent guard so the daily reconciliation job is safe to re-run.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: ERPNext Company (= Sage tenant) this reconciliation row belongs to.

fields.label: Party Type
fields.description: Whether this row reconciles a Customer (AR) or a Supplier (AP).

fields.label: Party
fields.description: The reconciled Customer or Supplier. May be blank on a Failed row when the Sage party could not be matched to an ERPNext record.

fields.label: Sage Closing Balance
fields.description: Closing balance Sage returned for this party for the period.

fields.label: ERPNext Outstanding
fields.description: ERPNext outstanding balance for this party at the period close, as a positive amount owed.

fields.label: Delta
fields.description: Sage closing balance minus ERPNext outstanding. The amount the reconciliation journal moves the control account by.

fields.label: Journal Entry
fields.description: The reconciliation Journal Entry posted for this row. Blank on Skipped / Failed rows.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Created = journal posted. Skipped = no action needed. Failed = an error occurred (see Error Message).

fields.label: Reconciliation Date
fields.description: Posting date used for the reconciliation journal (period close, or today for the current month).

fields.label: Error Message
fields.description: Populated on Failed rows with the error encountered while reconciling this party.

name: Sage Reconciliation Log
